notes: v3.5.0: resilience and portability. If AI is unreachable or a key fails, the app now detects whether it is a connection or a credential problem and automatically falls back to the offline engine with a clear, friendly message, so you are never blocked on another machine. New Run on another machine (portable) export/import moves all your data (with or without saved AI keys) to any Windows PC; core features need no account and no internet. Applies to both apps.
